programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu gets on Bhide's nerves when he calls Sonu inappropriately. Bhide is shocked when he catches Tapu's messages on Sonu's phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide decides to keep a careful eye on all of Sonu's activities. He eventually finds Sonu hanging out with Tapu around town.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide hears about his friend's daughter running away with her boyfriend and starts fearing the worst for Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With a new plan in mind, Taarak asks Jethalal to hand over Daya's gold jewellery to Gulabo. Daya is surprised to see Jethalal and Gulabo together in a temple.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal informs Taarak about advocate Jwala's footage and also discusses the issue with his lawyer. Jethalal's dealers are worried about their payments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jwala wins the case for Gulabo. Daya, Champaklal and Tapu decide to stay with Gulabo.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the members in Gokuldham Society search for Jethalal after they learn he is missing. Natu Kaka and Bagha cannot find Jethalal. Tapu turns aggressive and tries to destroy Gulabo's tent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal shocks everyone when he returns to Gokuldham Society as a hermit. He is now known as Jethanand and is accompanied by his guru, Champanand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Champaklal is furious, a teary-eyed Daya curses Gulabo for ruining their family. All the society members urge Jethalal to stay, but he apologises to everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides to leave, but Gulabo stops him. Gulabo finally tells everyone that the marriage is fake and apologises to all the society members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of Gokuldham Society are busy celebrating Diwali. Tappu receives a lot of money from the elders.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar comes to wish the Gada family on the occasion of Diwali. However, all is not as it seems as Sundar has something else on his mind.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar tries to convince Jethalal of his scheme, but Jethalal lies about not having enough money to finance the operation. Sundar feels disappointed and returns to Ahmedabad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides to buy another house in Gokuldham Society. However, Bhide decides to sell the same house to Roshan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan gifts Bhide a bike as commission for his new house. Jethalal gifts a television set to Madhvi for the house deal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Roshan both give the token amounts to Bhide for the same house. Bhide is stressed when neither side decides to back out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide finds himself in a fix about whom to sell the house to and ends up arguing with his wife in the process. Daya tries to convince Jethalal not to buy the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide explains the entire scenario and his conflict to Mr Chandaramani. Mr Chandaramani suggests a way out of the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is happy with Mr Chandaramani's suggestion of auctioning the flat. They wait for the owner to arrive so that the auction can begin.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the bidding continues in full swing, Jethalal and Roshan compete amongst themselves to raise a higher bid for the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Daya informs them about the saree sale in the city, all the women plan to take their husband's permission and go shopping together for sarees.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal refuses to allow Daya to go shopping for sarees, she devises a clever plan to persuade him. Later, all the women set off together to peruse the sale on sarees.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is shocked when she finds out the sarees she buys are defective. Meanwhile, all the women discover some defect in all the clothes they buy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and all the women go back to return the defective sarees, but the owner rudely turns them down. Later, the women inform their husbands about the problem, but they are too busy to help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and others reach the police station to register a complaint against the saree store owner, but the inspector advises them to register a complaint with the consumer forum.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
